nasb.text: Then he came there to a cave and lodged there; and behold, the word of the Lord  came to him, and He said to him, “What are you doing here, Elijah?”

esv.text: There he came to a cave and lodged in it. And behold, the word of the Lord came to him, and he said to him, “What are you doing here, Elijah?”

cnv.text: 他在那裡進了一個洞，就在洞裡過夜。耶和華的話臨到他，說：“以利亞啊，你在這裡幹甚麼？”

ccb.text: 他进了一个山洞，在里面过夜。耶和华就问他：“以利亚，你在这里做什么？”
